overview: An anime video streaming platform with a public browse grid, video player, user watchlists via Internet Identity, and a fully-functional admin panel for uploading and managing videos. Features a dark gray, black, and white theme.
features: Browse anime videos in a responsive grid with genre filters and search
Full HTML5 video player with play, pause, volume, fullscreen controls
Admin panel to upload, edit, and delete videos with metadata
Internet Identity login for user watchlist and admin access
Genre badges and filtering (Action, Adventure, Comedy, Romance, Fantasy, etc.)
Video upload with thumbnail and cover image via object storage
Delete confirmation dialogs and upload progress indicators
Grayscale dark theme (black, dark gray, white)
